TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Dowras ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Syurin go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 211 buwan, 615 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 91% kyan ku 558 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 9% kyan ku 57 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Truku 80%, Tayan 4%, Amis 3%, Bunun 1%, Sakizaya 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Dowras hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Dowras hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Dowras hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Dowras hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Dowras hya' ga Bsuring. tay mkyahu' na Dowras hya' ga Pratan. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ *owras~ɕ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu s~ɕjurin ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, truku **%, tajan *%, amis~ɕ *%, βunun *%, s~ɕakizaja *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na *owras~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na *owras~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na *owras~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na *owras~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na *owras~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕuriŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na *owras~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa pratan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Dowras ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Syurin go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 211 buwan, 615 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 91% kyan ku 558 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 9% kyan ku 57 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Truku 80%, Tayan 4%, Amis 3%, Bunun 1%, Sakizaya 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Dowras hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Dowras hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Dowras hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Dowras hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Dowras hya' ga Bsuring. tay mkyahu' na Dowras hya' ga Pratan. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ *owras~ɕ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu s~ɕjurin ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, truku **%, tajan *%, amis~ɕ *%, βunun *%, s~ɕakizaja *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na *owras~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na *owras~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na *owras~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na *owras~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na *owras~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕuriŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na *owras~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa pratan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
